The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

/home/franmolinam/Arquisis/E1/grupo7_iic.serviceRawFile:
service: cityexpress-jobsmaster

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: python3.10
  region: us-east-2   # O la región que estén usando en AWS
  httpApi:
    cors: true # Esto es necesario para el frontend

functions:
  heartbeat:
    handler: handler.heartbeat
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /heartbeat
          method: get

  createJob:
    handler: handler.create_job
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /job
          method: post

  getJob:
    handler: handler.get_job
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /job/{id}
          method: get
